recommendations.description: Fix rules checking wrong fields (logging, DLQ, role least privilege)
recommendations.impact: HIGH - Ensures rules validate correct compliance requirements

recommendations.description: Fix operator/expected_value type mismatches (exists operator with non-null value)

critical_issues.description: Logging rule checks if logConfiguration exists, not if logging is actually enabled
critical_issues.problem: Logging rule checks if logConfiguration exists, not if logging is actually enabled
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may not be checking correct field or configuration
critical_issues.recommendation: Verify correct field/operator usage to check actual configuration status, not just existence

critical_issues.description: Role least privilege rule checks if role ARN exists, not if role has least privilege configuration
critical_issues.problem: Role least privilege rule checks if role ARN exists, not if role has least privilege configuration
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may not be checking correct field or configuration
critical_issues.recommendation: Verify correct field/operator usage to check actual configuration status, not just existence

type_mismatches.fix: expected_value should be null for 'exists' operator, or use 'equals' operator with expected_value='networkInterfaceId'

cross_service_analysis.note: Note: Fargate uses ECS API methods, which is expected
cross_service_analysis.explanation: Fargate is a compute engine for ECS, so using ECS API methods (describe_services, describe_task_definition, describe_tasks) is correct. No cross-service issues found.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: No action needed - rules correctly use ECS API methods for Fargate resources

fixes_applied: Fixed list_services emit structure to avoid shadowing parent item (changed as: item to as: service_arn)
Fixed list_tasks emit structure to avoid shadowing parent item (changed as: task_item to as: task_arn)
Added on_error: continue to list_tasks, describe_tasks, and describe_services to handle empty results

known_limitations.limitation: Checks deploymentConfiguration existence as proxy. Full validation would require checking logConfiguration details.
known_limitations.impact: Medium - Proxy check may not catch all cases
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider enhancing to check actual logging configuration if available in API response

known_limitations.limitation: Checks roleArn existence as proxy. Cannot validate actual IAM policy least privilege without additional IAM API calls.
known_limitations.impact: High - Cannot validate actual least privilege
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider cross-service check with IAM service to validate role policies

known_limitations.limitation: Checks containerDefinitions existence as proxy. DLQ configuration is typically at service level, not task definition level.
known_limitations.impact: High - May not validate actual DLQ configuration
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider checking service-level DLQ configuration instead

known_limitations.limitation: Checks taskDefinitionArn existence as proxy. Full validation would require checking container logConfiguration.
known_limitations.impact: Medium - Proxy check may not catch all cases
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider enhancing to check containerDefinitions[].logConfiguration if available

known_limitations.limitation: Checks taskRoleArn existence as proxy. Cannot validate actual IAM policy least privilege without additional IAM API calls.
known_limitations.impact: High - Cannot validate actual least privilege
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider cross-service check with IAM service to validate role policies

known_limitations.limitation: Checks attachments existence as proxy. Full validation would require checking network interface details for public IP assignment.
known_limitations.impact: Medium - Proxy check may not catch all cases
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider enhancing to check attachment details for networkInterfaceId and public IP status

warnings: describe_tasks: InvalidParameterException - Tasks can not be blank (expected when no Fargate tasks exist, handled)
test_results.note: Only 5 service rules evaluated (task rules may not have found resources). Failures are expected when Fargate services/tasks don't have required configurations. This is correct behavior - failures are compliance failures, not implementation errors.
